title: Warper
description: Warper tool allows players to move certain amount further the way they're facing.
body:
# _Warper mod by kaanbuu._

### Mod contain 3 simple commands for its users:
```
/warper
``` 
Lets player get the Warper tool. The tool in hand used for teleporting player to the direction and orientation they're facing(where crosshair pointed). With the help of a simple raycasting algorithm.
- Use ```Right Mouse Button``` to teleport 16 blocks(1 chunk).
- Use ```Shift``` + ```Right Mouse Button``` to teleport 64 blocks(4 chunks).
- Can overwhelm client hardware depending on mods being used or resources allocated.
- Mod can also affect performance by simply existing(when being used). For normal teleportation requirements, _minimap mods_ or ```/tp``` commands can be more useful.

```
/warper_help
```
Lets player to display help for the mod. It's actually more of a tip than help. Can be enhanced in latter versions.

```
/warper_two_point_oh
```
Lets player get the second Warper tool which have further more travel capabilites. Just 
```RMB``` to travel 128 blocks(8 chunks) or ```Shift``` + ```RMB``` to travel 256 blocks(16 chunks).
- Even a NASA computer can have low performance with higher distances because, let's face it, Minecraft is not that much of an optimized videogame :/

## Mods video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ryx_NdWEG_U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Some questions(s) and answer(s).
**********************************************
### Why this mod even created?
I created the mod for me to help my singleplayer world gameplay. When using mods like Worldedit or Axiom, when I need to select an area, I am using this tool instead of flying/walking to positions.
**********************************************
### Can it also be used to travel to higher distances?
Mod doesn't offer any more than teleportation that is robust(Minimap mods or commands better for teleportation!). So every consecutive teleportation can bottleneck the chunk render mechanism and undermine the gaming experience. But if the hardware is enough to handle, maybe it can be used to travel further distances.
**********************************************
### Compatability Problems?
I didn't got any issues when using fabric 1.21.10 client, atleast with these mods.
![My 1.21.10 mod list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d7aca3804a53c027f72742d9ffc0fa2837f866.png)
**********************************************
> SPECIAL NOTE: This is not an original idea, the tools' concept is similar to famous Hypixel Skyblock servers' sword _Aspect of the Void_ and its abilities like _Instant Transmission_ and _Ether Transmission_.
